name: QVQ-72B-Preview
note: Experimental step-by-step visual reasoning model on a Qwen2-VL-72B base; single-round dialogue, no video input.

results.notes: Independent third-party reproduction via VLMEvalKit, reported in the InternVL3 Technical Report (Table 2, row 'QvQ-72B-Preview'). MathVista(mini) 70.3, vs. Qwen's own self-reported 71.4 -- minor eval-harness variance, not a discrepancy in the underlying benchmark.

Independent third-party reproduction via VLMEvalKit, reported in the InternVL3 Technical Report (Table 2, row 'QvQ-72B-Preview'). MathVision 34.9, vs. Qwen's own self-reported 35.9(full) -- minor eval-harness variance.

ChartQA-H (human split). From 'ChartSketcher: Reasoning with Multimodal Feedback and Reflection for Chart Understanding' (arXiv:2505.19076), Table 1, row 'QvQ-Preview-72B', used as an open-source vision baseline. Judged via majority vote (3 runs) with DeepSeek-Distill-Qwen-32B as the answer-alignment scorer.
DocVQA, from the general-dataset comparison table (Table 1, second half) in the ChartSketcher paper, row 'QvQ-Preview-72B'.
GQA, same ChartSketcher paper Table 1, row 'QvQ-Preview-72B'.
Flickr30k, same ChartSketcher paper Table 1, row 'QvQ-Preview-72B'.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real; blog qwenlm.github.io/blog/qvq-72b-preview/ gives Dec 25 2024 release, built on Qwen2-VL-72B. HF README (huggingface.co/Qwen/QVQ-72B-Preview) confirms 73B params, 'Qwen' license, 32,768 (32K) ctx (per third-party docs/config), and states verbatim it 'only supports single-round dialogues and image outputs... does not support video inputs' -- matches the note exactly. All 4 result rows (MMMU 70.3, MathVista 71.4, MathVision 35.9, OlympiadBench 20.4) verified verbatim on the HF model card. No changes made.
